fields.name: arrears_flags
fields.description: A list of arrears flags for customers

children.name: account_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the account

children.name: customer_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the customer

children.name: customer_name
children.description: The name of the customer

children.name: product_type
children.description: Type of product for which arrears are reported

children.name: arrears_status
children.description: Current arrears status for the customer

children.name: arrears_days
children.description: Number of days the customer is in arrears

children.name: outstanding_balance
children.description: The outstanding balance for the account

children.name: minimum_payment_due
children.description: Minimum payment due for the account

children.name: payment_due_date
children.description: Date by which the minimum payment is due

children.name: last_payment_date
children.description: Date of the last payment made by the customer

children.name: flag_severity
children.description: Severity level of the arrears flag

children.name: risk_category
children.description: Risk category for the customer's account

children.name: compliance_action_required
children.description: Indicates whether compliance action is required for the account

children.name: action_type
children.description: Type of action required for the account

children.name: flag_date
children.description: Date and time the arrears flag was raised

children.name: notes
children.description: Additional notes or comments about the account

children.name: report_date
children.description: Date of the report

children.name: total_flagged_accounts
children.description: Total number of accounts flagged in this report

children.name: source_department
children.description: Department that originated the data

children.name: destination_department
children.description: Department that received the data

children.name: report_version
children.description: Version number of the report
